calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-05-2014 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Rubke for Steven Shaffer (Personal Representative).

Mr. Rubke presented oral argument to support his position as to why he should not have to file a revised 13100 Declaration. Mr. Rubke also stated that the Estate value is under $40,000.00, that the $112,000.00 in cash mostly went on expenses, that there is a waiver of accounting, that he is not privileged to information and that his Client has offered explanations. The Court raised the issue of old language versus new language in the 13100 Declaration, expressed concern about this being a 2008 Estate, stated that the Grandmother did not benefit from the Estate, that instead the Grandson is benefitting, and questioned why the Estate did not get distributed to the Grandmother during her life time. The Petition for Final Distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
